programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker battles Tony in an intense showdown for the year's top gold haul; Rick grinds at Lightning Creek and expands his operation to save his season.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.sub-title: Forty Days to Fail or Fortune
programme.desc: A widowed Colorado mine owner and her foreman face a last stand to save her gold-rich, inherited claim; Freddy and Juan scramble with ingenious fixes and point them towards a pay streak before winter closes them out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan face a failing dry mine in Arizona run by military veterans; when a monsoon wreaks havoc on the rescue, they create their first-ever pay dryer system to quadruple the gold yield.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Freddy and Juan face a failing dry mine in Arizona run by military veterans; when a monsoon wreaks havoc on the rescue, they create their first-ever pay dryer system to quadruple the gold yield.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Fearless teams race creative, outrageous, and gravity-defying soapboxes, delivering must-see thrills and spills! With an insane course design featuring a massive 90-degree dirt berm, it will be a miracle if anyone makes it to the finish line.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: In a bid to rescue his season, Dustin plans a daring double dive to get gold; Kayla's crew struggles to adapt after losing a crew member.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Matt tackles a dangerous, ten-acre hoard in the Pennsylvania woods to hunt high-value guns and ammo; the old-school machinist's property is packed with heavy equipment and scrap metal, but $25,000 worth of precious metal could make a bet pay off.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: A garage-built experiment turns a cultural icon, the Meyers Manx dune buggy, which makes car building accessible to the masses; however, its success unleashes a flood of copycats that nearly wiped out the very garage that started it all.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: Join The Fish Guyz! Captain Lain Goodwin, Earl Byrd III, and an eclectic crew of local legends showcase the best fishing and tourism the Conch Republic offers. Professional chef Cat Pfeiffer demystifies seafood with simple recipes made for home kitchens.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy travels the globe chasing sought-after species with top fishing enthusiasts. Rick's experiences, humor, conservation focus, tips and trends deliver entertaining, high-energy, action-packed episodes guaranteed to share the adventure.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.sub-title: Miami Mahi and Sailfish While Grilling Steaks Offshore
programme.desc: Peter fishes mahi mahi.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: When a swarm of craft floods New Jersey's skies, panic erupts online; Andrew digs into every conspiracy theory, interviewing eyewitnesses and testing cutting-edge drone tech, until he uncovers the truth behind the incident.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: A failed assassination unleashes claims of a mind-controlled gunman; Andrew investigates the CIA's legacy of MK-Ultra, and stages a shocking experiment with mentalist Max Major to test whether a person really can be hypnotized into becoming an assassin.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew probes COVID-19's origin from all angles; using intelligence tradecraft, expert interviews, and real-world analysis, he investigates natural spillover, lab-related, and accidental release theories, and what he uncovers is shocking.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Are weather control fears fact, or just modern fiction? Andrew tests theories about chemtrails, cloud seeding, space lasers, and government weather weapons; through demonstrations and expert interviews, he untangles these conspiracies to find the truth.

programme.title: Conspiracies and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Andrew investigates what really happened to Jeffrey Epstein; by reconstructing the crime scene using insider insights, expert analysis and a full replica of his jail cell, he tests whether the evidence points to suicide, murder or something darker.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: New evidence suggests Jack the Ripper's identity, while DNA analysis indicates possible Yeti existence; Max Headroom interrupts live broadcast, surprising everyone.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: In 1590, the settlers of Roanoke vanished without a trace; new evidence finally reveals what happened; archaeologists investigate what destroyed the original Sin City, Sodom; a new theory suggests Stonehenge may be more than it seems.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: From a secret World War II unit that deceived Nazis, to the alleged crimes of the Knights Templar and a royal death tied to a scandal, Josh Gates explores mysteries built on coverups; was the truth buried to protect power, reputation and empires?

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores mysteries shaped by extreme weather: the fate of the Donner Party, a group of pioneers trapped in a Sierra Nevada blizzard; a secret Cold War missile base entombed in Arctic ice; and the ghost ship Mary Celeste, adrift in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates three aquatic mysteries: the Kraken, Lake Lanier and Atlantis. From terrifying sailor lore, to a deadly lake's dark past, and a lost city beneath the sea, he searches for evidence behind legends shaped by fear, myth and history.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inside one of Nevada's busiest jails, deputies battle a non-stop surge of arrests driven by Reno's constant crime and a major trafficking corridor; with gangs entrenched inside, keeping rival groups apart becomes a daily fight for control.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inside Butler County Jail, a six-term sheriff and his seasoned staff confront an unrelenting opioid crisis. As drugs flood the facility, officers work to dismantle the supply ring and maintain order.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Caddo Parish Correctional Center is struggling with a staffing shortage, the inmates outnumber the deputies by 180 to one; to ensure the safety of both inmates and staff alike, the Emergency Response Team springs into action.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: In rural Leake County, Mississippi, a small jail battles a big meth problem; with repeat offenders entering the jail daily, local law enforcement works to break the cycle.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Behind the walls of Clayton County Jail, deteriorating infrastructure creates dangerous conditions for both inmates and staff.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inside Butler County Jail, a six-term sheriff and his seasoned staff confront an unrelenting opioid crisis. As drugs flood the facility, officers work to dismantle the supply ring and maintain order.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Caddo Parish Correctional Center is struggling with a staffing shortage, the inmates outnumber the deputies by 180 to one; to ensure the safety of both inmates and staff alike, the Emergency Response Team springs into action.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: In rural Leake County, Mississippi, a small jail battles a big meth problem; with repeat offenders entering the jail daily, local law enforcement works to break the cycle.

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: Behind the walls of Clayton County Jail, deteriorating infrastructure creates dangerous conditions for both inmates and staff.

programme.title: Mud Madness
programme.sub-title: All's Fair in Mud and War
programme.desc: At Arkansas's Greasy Bend Off-Road Park, rivals Bryce and Josh wager big money on the small tire bounty course; Larry calls up an old friend to help him turn his season around; AJ does whatever it takes to take down his top competition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Gold miners Fred and his son Dustin are determined to make a fortune no matter the risk; but to find the big gold payout, they'll put their lives on the line by diving deep beneath the waters of one of Alaska's wildest creeks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.sub-title: Forty Days to Fail or Fortune
programme.desc: A widowed Colorado mine owner and her foreman face a last stand to save her gold-rich, inherited claim; Freddy and Juan scramble with ingenious fixes and point them towards a pay streak before winter closes them out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Auction Kings
programme.desc: A 1965 Mustang; a collection of 1970s lunch boxes; a Stumpf fiddle.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Fishing Shallow on a Windy Day in Hawk Channel with Capt. Chris Walter
programme.desc: Captain Scott Walker and his former mate Captain Chris Walter fish the shallow patch reefs of Hawk Channel on a windy day.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor fish Florida Bay out of Hawks Cay, catching an incredible variety of flats species -- tarpon, snook, redfish, trout, bonefish and more.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: The oft-misunderstood brown bear is one of North America's most formidable predators. Dan Cabela travels to Kodiak Island to meet the research team participating in a scientific collaring program aimed at better understanding predator-prey interactions.

programme.title: Legendary Locations
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation coexist, from the Chernobyl nuclear power plant to a Spanish festival that culminates in a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Chernobyl's First 48
programme.desc: Chernobyl, the world's most catastrophic nuclear accident, and for 48 hours, the Soviet government covered it all up, locking locals in a contaminated city; the story of the heroes who risked everything to prevent an even bigger global disaster.

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Hundreds of cameras capture a rare tornado outbreak in 2023 as it strikes Rolling Fork, Miss., and Little Rock, Ark.; when a twister hits Lewistown, Ill., a group of tornado spotters find themselves trapped in the eye of the storm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: When a tornado outbreak strikes Texas and Kansas in 2022, hundreds of eyewitnesses find themselves trapped in the path; as they seek the best shelter they can find, they capture the moments when tornadoes destroy the very structures around them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In May 2024, dozens of eyewitnesses capture rare twin tornadoes as they carve a parallel path of destruction across Iowa; with winds near 300 mph, the twister sisters topple farms, shred wind turbines and devastate the town of Greenfield.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: In the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: In March 2025, thousands of eyewitnesses capture disaster at their doorsteps as extreme atmospheric volatility unleashes a massive Texas haboob and more than 150 tornadoes across the southern states, devastating towns and homesteads in their path.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A transgender Air Force vet and a South African farmer tackle the deadly bush of Zambia, where territorial elephants, baboons and crocodiles threaten their every move; when disaster strikes, a sibling seeks redemption.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: In this Tribes' episode, two men and a woman attempt to survive 21 days in the searing heat of Limpokwena, South Africa; after suffering from harsh burns and severe dehydration on Day 1, their will to endure is threatened.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two city slickers from the urban jungles of New York City see if they have what it takes to survive for 14 days in South Africa; the rough terrain, extreme heat and elusive resources could prove more challenging than they anticipated.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A South African ranger and a Texan wilderness guide set out to prove they can survive 21 days in a remote Thai jungle, where relentless monsoons, failed traps, and a face-off with a king cobra drive them to the edge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Four survivalists attempt 21 days in the Kalahari Desert. But as brutal starvation sets in, desperation forces the group to confront fractured trust, extreme choices, and the limits of human endurance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: At a hoard Matt's been circling for years, a genius inventor's pinball and jukebox collection could bring big sales -- but only if it's intact. Removing a 1980s waterbed costs time and money. Matt needs a hazmat suit to search a fridge marked as toxic.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Veteran survivalists Ky Furneaux and Dan Link take on their toughest challenge yet: surviving 14 days in Thailand with no tools at all, but when they can't ignite a fire, their challenge is quickly threatened.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
